title: Microsoft for Manufacturing | Microsoft AI
text: Hannover Messe 2026: Learn how global leaders unlock industrial intelligence Read the blog INDUSTRY Microsoft for Manufacturing Unlock intelligence with a platform that connects your data across the entire value chain. Intelligent factories Turn data into insights by using AI to boost visibility and spot optimization opportunities. Connected customers Boost customer satisfaction by helping teams better understand their needs. CAPABILITIES Achieve more with Microsoft Accelerate product innovation, optimize operations, empower workers, and enhance customer experiences. Boost agility, efficiency, and scalability by running product lifecycle management (PLM) and computer-aided engineering (CAE) workloads on the cloud. Learn how Quickly simulate scenarios for product design optimization, process improvement, and factory setup decisions with reduced data sampling.
